mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_complex_property_rel ( complex_org_id, property_company_org_id, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{complexOrgId}, #{propertyCompanyOrgId}, #{status}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_complex_property_rel SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, complex_org_id, property_company_org_id, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version FROM biz_complex_property_rel WHERE complex_org_id = #{complexOrgId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
